summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Yrvante website. All core functionality works perfectly including backend APIs, frontend UI, language toggle, navigation, contact form, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (root, contact, status) return 200 status
Contact form submission stores data in MongoDB and shows success message
Homepage loads with all required sections (Hero, Services, Target, About, Portfolio, Why, Contact)
Language toggle works perfectly between Dutch and English
Navigation links scroll smoothly to correct sections
Sticky navigation styling applies correctly on scroll
Contact form fields are focusable and submission clears form
Mobile menu toggle works correctly on mobile devices
Desktop navigation properly hidden on mobile breakpoints
All data-testid attributes present for interactive elements
Mobile responsive layout works across different sections
